transcription.text: Just once more. Friends, do you have rust? I mean, do you have a rust problem around your house? Well, here's the answer to it. The beautiful way to stop rust. DeRusto, not an ordinary paint. DeRusto is made specially to protect and beautify. And thanks to its exclusive ingredient, DeRustite, DeRusto penetrates and practically welds itself to metal to stop and prevent rust. DeRusto can be brushed on, sprayed on, or rolled on. DeRusto in 24 decorator colors. The beautiful way to stop rust. Hey, Don! Oh, no kidding, folks. I use it. Try it. It's really great. DeRusto, the beautiful way to stop rust. Available at paint, hardware, and building supply stores everywhere. Insist on DeRusto.
